metadata.description: A personal memory layer for Claude Code: session hooks stream context to a local ingest server, a cheap LLM extracts entities/relations into Neo4j, and an MCP server exposes search/RAG back to Claude Code.

plugins.name: quack
plugins.description: Self-hosted Claude Code memory: hooks + MCP tools backed by Neo4j. Pair with the Quack server (docker compose stack in the same repo).
